title: Batch 1 — Over-clean product brief
baseline_summary: The baseline path remains usable, but the brief is polished enough that readers can borrow too much scope certainty from presentation quality alone.
delta_summary_tail: captured why polish looked like stronger constraint grounding than it was.

comparison_axes.reason: The baseline route remains correct, and Delta mainly refines how narrowly it should be read.
Delta more clearly separates explicit constraints from polish-borrowed assumptions.
Delta resists treating neat presentation as evidence of complete scope clarity.
Delta highlights the thin signals behind the strongest confidence moves.
Both tracks remain usable once the case is narrowed back to explicit boundaries.
